title: Let's Create Things
description: Let's Create Things originally started as a Create orientated pack for a small group of friends. Over time it has grown into much more. There are still many plans and we are just getting started with what this pack will become!
body:
# Let's Create Things!

Welcome to LCT! This pack was originally just a small thing thrown together for a couple friends. That group kept growing and the scope of the pack grew with it. Now it's become my first fully fledged modpack project! The pack itself is primarily centered around the Create mod, hence the name Let's Create Things. But, you will also find many other mods, with the goal of keeping them all balanced and focused around Create. All of this is done to encourage you, the player, to create things! Whether that is realistic factories, or machines created by your wildest imagination, you can build it here.

The pack has been crafted with the intention of playing with friends and is fully multiplayer compatible. That said, there is nothing stopping you from enjoying it on your own either.

## Planned Features
This pack is an ever evolving project, and as such will likely see many changes to come. This list of planned features is not exhaustive, and any plans here are not guaranteed to happen.
- Quests.
- More multiplayer integration (Simple VC, trading etc).
- Config optimization.
- Performance optimization.
- Balancing.
- Custom crafting recipies.

Thank you for taking the time to checkout my pack. Now what are you waiting for? Let's Create Things!
